heading: Definitions
label: 70054 Definitions
notes: References in TextPresidential Proclamation Number 5928, referred to in par. (2), is Proc. No. 5928, , 54 F.R. 777, which is set out as a note under , Public Lands.Dec. 27, 1988section 1331 of Title 43

children.heading: .—United states
children.label: 1 .—United states
children.text: The term “United States” includes all territory and waters, continental or insular, subject to the jurisdiction of the United States.

children.heading: .—Territorial waters
children.label: 2 .—Territorial waters
children.text: The term “territorial waters of the United States” includes all waters of the territorial sea of the United States as described in Presidential Proclamation 5928 of .December 27, 1988
